name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
A mini bestseller, the popular model is here. Original vintage gold 💯 perfect shape paired with a high-end and atmospheric look 🍂🍂 YSL, interesting and cute! Model No.: 36607. Dimensions: 18x15x6cm
